title: G-1450, Authorization for Credit Card Transactions
description: Authorizes credit card payment for eligible USCIS lockbox filings.

fields.tooltip: Credit Card Information.  Enter the authorized payment amount in dollars no cents (for example, 1234 or 1,234)
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.
